errors.emailAlreadyInUse: 此电子邮件已注册其他账号。
errors.invalidEmail: 请输入有效的电子邮件地址。
errors.userNotFound: 未找到与此电子邮件关联的账号。
errors.weakPassword: 密码太弱。请至少使用 6 个字符。
errors.networkRequestFailed: 网络错误。请检查您的连接。
errors.tooManyRequests: 尝试失败次数过多。请稍后再试。
errors.operationNotAllowed: 此登录方法目前已禁用。
errors.default: 发生意外的身份验证错误。
errors.invalidCredential: The email or password you entered is incorrect. Please check your credentials and try again.
errors.accountExistsWithDifferentCredential: An account already exists with this email but using a different sign-in method. Please sign in with your password.
errors.popupClosedByUser: The sign-in popup was closed before completing. Please try again.
errors.cancelledPopupRequest: The sign-in request was cancelled. Only one popup can be open at a time.
errors.popupBlocked: The sign-in popup was blocked by your browser. Please allow popups for this site.
